golden_categories.name: General Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for general credit card validation without specifying a provider.

golden_categories.name: Invalid Provider Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling invalid or unsupported credit card providers.

golden_categories.name: AmEx Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating American Express (AmEx) credit cards.

golden_categories.name: Diners Club Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating Diners Club credit cards.

golden_categories.description: Tests for validating Discover credit cards.

golden_categories.description: Tests for validating JCB credit cards.

golden_categories.name: Mastercard Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating Mastercard credit cards.

golden_categories.name: UnionPay Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating UnionPay credit cards.

golden_categories.name: Visa Credit Card Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating Visa credit cards.

generated_categories.name: Generic Credit Card Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests generic credit card validation without specifying a provider, including valid and invalid numbers based on length and format.

generated_categories.name: Provider-Specific Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests credit card validation for specific providers, including valid numbers for the provider and invalid numbers from other providers or invalid provider options.

generated_categories.name: Formatting Edge Cases
generated_categories.description: Tests handling of formatted credit card numbers with valid and invalid separators.

generated_categories.name: Invalid Input Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests behavior with empty strings, non-numeric inputs, and mixed alphanumeric inputs.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on generic credit card validation without specifying a provider, including valid and invalid cases.
GENC-2 includes tests for invalid provider handling, but also covers provider-specific validation, which is outside the scope of GC-2.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with AmEx validation in GC-3, but it is not exclusively focused on AmEx.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Diners Club validation in GC-4, but it is not exclusively focused on Diners Club.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Discover validation in GC-5, but it is not exclusively focused on Discover.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with JCB validation in GC-6, but it is not exclusively focused on JCB.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Mastercard validation in GC-7, but it is not exclusively focused on Mastercard.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with UnionPay validation in GC-8, but it is not exclusively focused on UnionPay.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Visa validation in GC-9, but it is not exclusively focused on Visa.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 aligns directly with GC-1 in testing generic credit card validation without specifying a provider.
GENC-2 spans multiple golden categories by covering provider-specific validation, but it does not exclusively focus on any single provider.
GENC-3 focuses on formatting edge cases, which is not explicitly covered by any golden category.
GENC-4 addresses invalid input handling (e.g., empty strings, non-numeric inputs), which is not explicitly covered by any golden category.

novel_generated_categories.reason: GENC-3 introduces tests for formatting edge cases, which are not explicitly covered by any golden category.
GENC-4 introduces tests for invalid input handling, which are not explicitly covered by any golden category.
